raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "issue": "Index builder fails due to AST parsing errors and skipped files; archived despite active dependency. code-index.json reports recent timestamp but 0 modules/endpoints, creating false confidence.", "recommended_fix": "1. Move code_index.py out of archive/ and into active tools. 2. Fix AST parsing by wrapping in try-except, log errors, continue indexing. 3. Validate INDEXED_PATHS includes apps/api/app and apps/web/src. 4. Add vola-builder.config.json to define module/endpoint discovery rules."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Index integrity compromised — tooling reports success while output is empty. Launch blocker for any agent relying on code context.", "next_files_to_read": ["memory/swarm/code-index.json", "packages/swarm/tools/code_index.py"]}

findings.issue: Index builder fails due to AST parsing errors and skipped files; archived despite active dependency. code-index.json reports recent timestamp but 0 modules/endpoints, creating false confidence.
findings.recommended_fix: 1. Move code_index.py out of archive/ and into active tools. 2. Fix AST parsing by wrapping in try-except, log errors, continue indexing. 3. Validate INDEXED_PATHS includes apps/api/app and apps/web/src. 4. Add vola-builder.config.json to define module/endpoint discovery rules.

whistleblower_flag: Index integrity compromised — tooling reports success while output is empty. Launch blocker for any agent relying on code context.
